message:
test(fcp-conformance/mesh-lease-coordinator-config): pin LeaseCoordinatorConfig defaults + AcquireOutcome/RenewOutcome/ReleaseOutcome wire format + ConflictSeverity + LeaseConflict (resolves flywheel_connectors-mvfpy)

27 tests complementing lease_coordinator_causality and
lease_coordinator_conflict_renew (which pinned flow tests but not
config defaults or full variant matrix).

- LeaseCoordinatorConfig 6 documented defaults: default_ttl_secs=300
  (5min), min_ttl_secs=10, max_ttl_secs=3600 (1h),
  renew_threshold_bps=2000 (renew at 20% remaining),
  max_leases_per_node=64, escalate_dangerous_conflicts=true
  (fail-loud for split-brain risk); serde roundtrip preserves all 6
- AcquireOutcome 4 internally-tagged variants (outcome=granted/
  rejected/denied/conflict) with full payload serde + roundtrip +
  reject unknown tag
- RenewOutcome 2 variants (renewed/denied) with outcome tag + payload
- ReleaseOutcome 2 variants (released/not_held); CRITICAL: NotHeld
  embeds as 'not_held' snake_case
- ConflictSeverity 3 snake_case (info/warning/critical) + reject
  uppercase/unknown + Copy + distinct
- LeaseConflict 7-field serde roundtrip + severity embeds snake_case
- ConflictingHolder 3-field roundtrip + PartialEq full

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
